prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic shot flying through the interior of a fiber-optic and network-hardware landscape. Multiple distinct glowing data streams travel through transparent fiber-optic cables and converge from different directions toward a single point ahead. Each stream carries flowing binary code and small luminous packet-blocks, and they originate from separate directions as if coming from different services and destinations, all funneling into one shared channel. The camera flies forward along the bundled fiber lines, past photoreal network routers and switch hardware: brushed dark-metal chassis with rows of blinking status LEDs, gold-tinted connector pins, faint dust on the anodized surfaces, real micro-scratches and wear on the metal. The transparent fibers refract the light of the streams inside them, subsurface glow, real caustics on the cable walls. Deep near-black environment, electric cyan and cool blue as the dominant data color with tiny amber and magenta accent LEDs on the hardware. Volumetric depth, atmospheric haze, motion implied by streaking light trails inside the fibers. Shallow depth of field with the convergence point sharp and near hardware softly blurred. Subtle chromatic aberration, fine grain, real optical bokeh. 20mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 320. Dark-tech documentary-realism aesthetic in the style of an Apple or Nvidia product film. Do not make it cartoonish; keep photoreal metal, glass and light physics. Balanced, legible exposure — the luminous elements read bright, clearly exposed and detailed against deep but controlled blacks that retain detail, cohesive with the series' dark-tech grade. No muddy, murky, or underexposed haze; no crushed midtones.
negative_prompt: cartoon, illustration, low-poly, video game render, oversaturated neon, rainbow, cluttered chaos, distorted hardware, melted metal, warped cables, unreadable garbage text, watermark, logo, low resolution, plastic toy look, cheesy sci-fi, lens flare spam, HDR halos, underexposed, muddy, murky, crushed midtones, dim underexposed glow, low-contrast haze, invisible details, washed out

settings.style: documentary realism, dark-tech cinematic, fiber-optic flythrough
settings.lighting: self-emissive data streams inside fibers, hardware status LEDs, cyan dominant, deep shadow
settings.camera_angle: forward flythrough along converging fiber bundle, centered vanishing point
settings.depth_of_field: shallow, convergence point sharp, near hardware soft
settings.quality: high detail, real metal and glass texture, subtle grain
